Ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026, a final chance for the participating Nations to play together as team in a match environment.
All 104 matches from the FIFA World Cup are live and exclusive only on beIN SPORTS MAX Channels from 11th June – 19th July.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: In the Footsteps of Nuno Mendes
beIN SPORTS 4.title: In the Footsteps of Nuno Mendes
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: From Lisbon to Paris, from Sporting Clube de Portugal to Paris Saint-Germain, from his first matches on the pitches of Boavista to the UEFA Champions League victory, beIN takes you... on the trail of Nuno Mendes!

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Rennes vs Olympique Lyonnais - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 4
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Rennes vs Olympique Lyonnais - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 4
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: There has not been a single draw in the last nine Ligue 1 meetings between Rennes and Lyon, since a 2-2 draw in January 2021. Rennes have won three of their last four home games against Lyon in Ligue 1, as many as in their previous 16.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Lille vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 4
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Lille vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 4
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Lille have won five of their last seven Ligue 1 matches against Toulouse. Lille have scored in each of their last 17 home games against Toulouse in Ligue 1, their second-best run against any opponent in their history, after their streak against St Etienne between 1994 and 2019.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Strasbourg vs Le Havre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 4
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Strasbourg vs Le Havre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 4
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Strasbourg have lost two of their last three games against Le Havre in all competitions  after losing just one of the previous 13. Strasbourg have won only one of their last six home games against Le Havre in Ligue 1, after winning six of the previous seven.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Brest vs Paris FC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 4
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Brest vs Paris FC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 4
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Brest and Paris FC will face each other for the first time in Ligue 1. The Bretons have not lost any of their last eight games against the Parisians in all competitions. Neither team have scored more than one goal in Paris FC's last seven away games against Brest in all competitions.
